notification.restart_required: Restart Skyrim for the changes to take effect.
popup.exclusions.title: Confirm Exclusions
popup.exclusions.reinclude_body: These mods will be managed by my menu again and their hotkeys will be relocated. Restart Skyrim afterward so they reload cleanly.
popup.exclusions.restore_preview_intro: Choose which settings to restore for the newly excluded mods:
popup.exclusions.success_body: Changes applied successfully! It is highly recommended to restart Skyrim so the mods reload their native configurations cleanly.
popup.launcher_hotkey_options.title: Launcher Hotkey Options
exclusions.description: Excluding mods releases their keys back to the game.
hotkey.via_api: Run through the mod's API (native key off)
settings.open_in_console: Can open menu while console is open
settings.keep_game_running: Keep the game running while menu is open
settings.hide_excluded_launcher: Excluded mods don't appear in launcher menu
tooltip.trigger_mode: Trigger mode (single / double / hold) and hold time
tooltip.language: Choose the language JSON Risa should load. Changes apply immediately.
tooltip.font_scale: Scales only menu text. UI Scale still changes both layout and text.
tooltip.easy_close: By default, if modifiers, double-tap, or hold are set to open, they are also required to close. Enabling this makes closing always a single press of the key under all settings.
tooltip.advanced_bindings_edited: Advanced Bindings (edited: modifiers or trigger mode set)
tooltip.launcher_clash_reason:
Can't enable: this key is the launcher hotkey.
Click the key to rebind it to something else.
tooltip.mcm_hotkey: Sets a hotkey to open the MCM directly. Turn ON to use it, or OFF to free the key for normal gameplay (you can still open MCM using the launcher button).
tooltip.remember_sub_menu:
When on, a mod's sub-menu (e.g. Community Shaders) stays open after you
close and reopen the launcher, until you press Back.
tooltip.open_in_console: Open the launcher while the console is up. Use the mouse to navigate.
tooltip.keep_game_running: Keep the world moving (animations, fire) instead of pausing.
tooltip.show_exclusions_tab: Displays a dedicated 'Exclusions' tab where you can opt-out specific mods from being managed by this menu.
tooltip.hide_excluded_launcher: When enabled, mods marked as 'Excluded' will be hidden from the launcher's main button grid.
tooltip.enable_logging:
The full troubleshooting log.
Documents\My Games\Skyrim Special Edition\SKSE\RisaAllInOneMenu.log
tooltip.log_file_changes:
A separate audit of exactly which config files this mod
edits (EDIT) or reverts (REVERT) - nothing else.
Documents\My Games\Skyrim Special Edition\SKSE\RisaAllInOneMenu_FileChanges.log
tooltip.restore_originals:
Restore the user settings captured before my menu changed them.
Missing captured values use the original mod defaults.
tooltip.restore_defaults:
Ignore captured user settings and restore every managed setting
to the original default provided by the supported mod.
restore.defaults_done: All managed settings restored to their original mod defaults.
restore.originals_done: All managed settings restored to the user's original settings.
restore.backup_removed: The originals backup was archived as completed so a future install starts fresh.
restore.quit_then_disable: Quit Skyrim, then disable this mod before the next launch.
restore.exit_prompt: Do you want to exit the game now?
restore.confirm_defaults: Restore the supported mods' original defaults and ignore captured user settings?
restore.confirm_originals: Restore the user settings captured before my menu changed them?
restore.incomplete: Restore was incomplete. The originals backup was kept; check the logs and retry.
help.title: RISA'S ALL IN ONE MENU
help.dragging.title: Window
help.dragging.move: - Drag the title bar to move the launcher.
help.dragging.resize: - Resize Settings and Exclusions from the bottom edge.
help.remap.title: Hotkeys
help.remap.intro: Risa keeps mod hotkeys from fighting each other. Managed mods may use a parked internal key while Risa's selected key opens the mod through its normal input or API path.
help.advanced.title: Advanced bindings
help.advanced.intro: Use the keyboard button beside a hotkey to configure modifiers, double-press, hold, or reset.
help.advanced.status: A green keyboard button means that hotkey has custom advanced settings. Gray means it uses the default single-press behavior.
help.exclusions.title: Exclusions
help.exclusions.body: Excluding a mod stops my menu from managing it and lets you restore either the user's original settings or the original mod defaults.
help.backup.title: Maintenance
help.backup.body: Restore User Original Settings returns captured pre-install values. Restore Original Mod Defaults ignores the capture and applies each supported mod's original defaults.
